title: MTR Low effort Lisbon Metro Trains
description: Low effort Lisbon Metro trains to satisfy the general public! (For now)
body:
# Low effort Lisbon Metro Trains
This pack adds Lisbon Metro ML90 & ML20 retextured from M-Train from the base MTR mod.
![ML90](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cf12acaee0b8c1573b03a5030e3aab264497e3f.png)
## Trains
- ML90
- ML20
## Features
- New original motor sounds
- Customised interior seats
